name: Renishaw PLC
description: A world leader in precision measurement and manufacturing systems, providing metrology sensors, position encoders, calibration equipment, additive manufacturing systems, spectroscopy instruments and neurological surgical products. FY ends 30 June.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Global precision manufacturing demand across industrial metrology, position measurement, additive manufacturing, spectroscopy and neurological devices. Revenue £691.3m in FY2024 (+0.4%, +3.7% at constant FX). Strong APAC and Americas growth offset by EMEA softness. £6bn total addressable market growing >5% p.a.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin 15.7% in FY2024 (down from 18.9% in FY2023) due to adverse FX, labour cost inflation and severance costs. Targeting >20% adjusted operating margin through productivity improvements and operating leverage on higher volumes. Gross margin 61% (FY2023: 64%).
assumptions.risks: Cyclical exposure to semiconductor, automotive and aerospace markets. FX exposure (>94% overseas revenue, GBP reporting). Emerging Chinese competitors creating pricing pressure. Heavy capex cycle (Miskin facility expansion). ERP transformation risk. Concentrated founding shareholder ownership (53%).
assumptions.catalyst: Semiconductor cycle recovery driving encoder demand. Systems sales growth (Equator, AGILITY CMMs). TEMPUS technology reducing AM build times by 50%. Industrial automation product line expansion. Miskin capacity expansion enabling future growth. Reducing capex from peak levels improving FCF conversion.
